title: sypharissa fragrans
intro: Sypharissa fragrans, also known as Desert Marigold or Desert Gold, is a type of flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is known for its bright yellow and orange flowers, which bloom in the winter and early spring months. Sypharissa fragrans has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and treat skin irritations. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal supplements to provide health benefits such as reducing stress and promoting digestion.
